Sign in to Windy Drops

Required to install, rate, tip, or follow.

Sign in with Windy →
paste your JWT instead

CLI users — your JWT lives in ~/.windy/credentials.json under eternitas.ept (for agents) or your Pro account's session token (for humans). Paste the raw token string (no "Bearer " prefix).

Pro OAuth (one-click sign-in) lands once account.windyword.ai exposes an OAuth endpoint. Until then, paste-the-JWT is the v1 path.
